extraction.one_line_summary: O'CONNOR Ben attacked solo inside 12km on La Molina, held off disorganized chase including late-charging SOLER to win by 10 seconds
tactical_patterns: Movistar's relentless pace-setting devastated BikeExchange, forcing YATES Simon to chase back multiple times before final climb.
Chase group failed to organize against O'CONNOR's solo move despite having numbers; SOLER's counterattack came too late at 3km.
VAN DER POEL abandoned breakaway cooperation on La Molina when BIZKARRA tagged, signaling GC teams misread threat window.
O'CONNOR's attack timing at 12km exploited transition zone before steepest gradients where chasers couldn't maximize power advantage.

rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: negative: abandoned mid-race due to illness, unwilling to face cameras
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: negative: visibly struggling with illness despite stage 1 win, health declining rapidly
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: commentators noted absence of 'old hands' stepping up, suggesting poor form on mountain finish
rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: repeatedly distanced on climbs by Movistar's pace, appeared last wheel on final ascent
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: positive: strongest chaser launching at 3km, but isolated effort reveals team lacked support depth
rider_signals.O'CONNOR Ben: positive: AG2R offered four-year contract mid-race based on grand tour resilience, confirmed with calculated solo win
